title: Judy of Rogues' Harbor
actors: Mary Miles Minter, Charles Meredith, Herbert Standing
plot: Orphaned waif Judy, lives with Grandpap Ketchel, a cruel and often brutal man. The sole protector of little Denny, Ketchel's grandson, Judy is forced to accept the attentions of Jim Shuckles, whom she abhors and who has compromise...
